CVE-2009-4495.title: Yaws 1.85 writes data to a log file without sanitizing non-printa ...
CVE-2009-4495.description: Yaws 1.85 writes data to a log file without sanitizing non-printable characters, which might allow remote attackers to modify a window's title, or possibly execute arbitrary commands or overwrite files, via an HTTP request containing an escape sequence for a terminal emulator.
